summary: Added focused compositor unit tests that harden identity as_str accessors and OutputStatus::workspace against the supplied mutation baseline survivor cluster.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: Evidence records the relevant workspace mutation baseline cluster for compositor identity/status accessors.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: evidence/m4-compositor-identity-mutation-hardening/notes.md records the ids.rs as_str survivors and status.rs workspace survivor supplied by the node.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: Focused tests cover OutputId, WorkspaceId, SessionId, and OutputStatus::workspace behavior.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: crates/compositor/src/ids.rs and crates/compositor/src/status.rs contain focused unit tests for the accessors.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: nix develop -c cargo test -p madobe-compositor --all-features passes.
Targeted mutation checks are clean for compositor identity and status accessors.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: Orchestrator targeted runs passed: ids.rs 12 mutants tested with 7 caught and 5 unviable; status.rs 19 mutants tested with 3 caught and 16 unviable. No missed mutants and no timeouts.
Created the requested files under evidence/m4-compositor-identity-mutation-hardening and reports/qd/m4-compositor-identity-mutation-hardening.

commandsRun.evidence: Rustfmt reported formatting changes in new tests before cargo fmt was run.
Initial run failed on clippy expect_used in the new tests.
Rustfmt reported wrapping changes after clippy cleanup.
Final compositor package test run passed.
Reran after adding evidence and completion files; markdownlint and lint-lines passed.

realWorldValidation.evidence: This node only adds focused unit tests for pure compositor accessor behavior.
